Package org.key_project.util.testcategories

@NullMarked package org.key_project.util.testcategories
This file defines the different test categories.

Please define own categories on demand, and adopt the build.gradle files.

See Also:
  • "https://dzone.com/articles/closer-look-junit-categories"
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.key_project.util
     
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    Interactive
    CIs should never execute these tests, because they require manual interaction.
    Performance
    Tests for performance regression measuring.
    Slow
    Category for slow test cases, that should only consider on Jenkins (merge request and main).
